product_updates.title: SoftBank’s CEO isn’t the only one with questions about Elon Musk’s orbital data center hype
product_updates.content: Not everyone is buying Elon Musk’s vision for orbital data centers.

product_updates.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
product_updates.content: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

product_updates.title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
product_updates.content: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

product_updates.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
product_updates.content: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

product_updates.title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
product_updates.content: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.
